# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of **env-vault** is supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.0.x   | ✔️        |
| < 1.0.0 | ❌         |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

As a sovereign tool focused on cryptography, we take security reports seriously. If you discover a vulnerability, please report it via the following method:

1. **Email:** support@cortlet.com
2. **Details:** Include a description of the vulnerability and a proof-of-concept (PoC) if possible.

You will receive an acknowledgment of your report within 48 hours. We ask that you follow responsible disclosure guidelines and give us time to address the issue before making it public.

---
*Part of the Cortlet software brand.*
